levelList.name: 貫穿大潮之槍
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 每有2名<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>帯有[ColdAirDOQ]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有1層[ColdAirDOQ]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 粉碎大潮之槍
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 每有2名<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>帯有[ColdAirDOQ]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[ColdAirDOQ]，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1
[WhenUse] 主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有1層[ColdAirDOQ]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Sinking]
- 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[ColdAirDOQ]，則使其増加1級[Sinking]強度

levelList.name: 猟潮
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[FreezingDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[WhenUse] 攻撃帯有[FreezingDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>時，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+2
[WhenUse] 每有2名帯有[ColdAirDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttackHead] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[AttackUp](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[EnemyKill] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[FreezingDOQ]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復20点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 殺死大海，殺死大海！！
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
[WhenUse] 每有1名<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>帯有[ColdAirDOQ]，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+5%(最多+30%)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttackHead] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[AttackUp](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>額外造成((1+<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[ColdAirDOQ]層数)×10)点<color=#1BC7F0>憂郁</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[EnemyKill] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[FreezingDOQ]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復20点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 殺死大海，殺死大海！！
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[FreezingDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[WhenUse] 每有1名帯有[ColdAirDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+5%(最多+30%)
[WhenUse] 每有2名帯有[ColdAirDOQ]的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttackHead] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[AttackUp](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>額外造成((1+<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[ColdAirDOQ]層数)×10)点<color=#1BC7F0>憂郁</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[EnemyKill] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[FreezingDOQ]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復20点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 不屈的騎士
levelList.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[Agility](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復15点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 細胞注入
levelList.desc: [OnDirectAttack] 使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+2

levelList.name: 斬裂
levelList.desc: <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 揮舞斬撃
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有1層[Binding]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 連續突刺
levelList.desc: <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成等同于其[NervousImpairment]層数的<color=#1BC7F0>憂郁</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

levelList.name: 合一的意志
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[StartBattle] 使<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>最低的友方深海教徒在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>獲得2層[Agility]

levelList.name: 拡散的歓喜
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[StartBattle] 使<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>最高的友方深海教徒在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>獲得2層[Enhancement]

levelList.name: 解放的意識
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[Binding]，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+2
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加6級[Sinking]強度

levelList.name: 環境适應
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得50点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[EndBattle] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[Enhancement]

levelList.name: 為了陸上的同胞
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若当前激活了[NetherseaBrandUnit]，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+3
- [NetherseaBrandUnit]每有1階段，額外使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1

[WhenUse] 主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
若[NetherseaBrandUnit]階段不低于2，則令本技能施加的[NervousImpairment]額外+1層

levelList.name: 焦灼自我的旁路
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
本技能不会対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得100層[AbyssalVitality]

levelList.name: 安息的回響
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
優先指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，其中優先指定現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>為主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>固定為0点
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+4)
[StartBattle] 若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#ffffff>目標</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則召喚<color=#ffffff>目標</color>時每消耗4層[AbyssalVitality]，<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使其獲得1層[DefenseUp](最多5層)
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加3級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]

levelList.name: 升天的回響
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
優先指定現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最高的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>
若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>固定為0点
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+4)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則召喚<color=#ffffff>目標</color>時每消耗4層[AbyssalVitality]，<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使其獲得1層[AttackUp](最多5層)
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加3級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]

levelList.name: 循環的生態系統
levelList.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[EndBattle] 每有1名存活的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，消耗1層[AbyssalVitality]，并使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>獲得層数相当于其存活回合数的[AttackDmgUp](最多3層)
[DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>不会獲得[AttackDmgUp]

levelList.name: 以深藍的温情。
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3層[NervousImpairment]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+9)
若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>固定為0点
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[DefeatDuel]
- 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[ResultReduction]与3層[Paralysis]
- 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱
- 令本技能施加的[NervousImpairment]層数減半，且不会増加[Sinking]強度或施加[Sinking]層数
- 使本技能獲得的[AbyssalVitality]層数減半
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得100層[AbyssalVitality]
[EndBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>開始時在友方戦場生成[NetherseaBrandUnit]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加4級[Sinking]強度并対其施加4層[Sinking]与4層[NervousImpairment]

levelList.name: 潮之軌迹
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[AbyssalVitality]層数不低于50層，則消耗5層[AbyssalVitality]并令本技能施加的[NervousImpairment]層数額外+2層
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5層[NervousImpairment]，消耗1層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+5)

levelList.name: 激烈的乱流
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[AbyssalVitality]層数不低于50層，則消耗4層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有10層[NervousImpairment]，消耗3層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 揺曳的波涛
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3層[NervousImpairment]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+9)
[EndBattle] 消耗最多10層[AbyssalVitality]并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得層数相当于消耗量一半的[AttackUp](最多5層，向上取整)
- [DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>不会獲得[AttackUp]

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]

levelList.name: 在他們所篤信的善意失去价値之前。
levelList.desc:
優先指定[NervousImpairment]層数最高的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3層[NervousImpairment]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+9)
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[DefeatDuel]
- 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[ResultReduction]与3層[Paralysis]
- 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱
- 令本技能施加的[NervousImpairment]層数減半，且不会増加[Sinking]強度或施加[Sinking]層数
- 使本技能獲得的[AbyssalVitality]層数与<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>減半
[EndSkill]
- 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得100層[AbyssalVitality]
- 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得等同于<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
- 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>
[EndBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>開始時在<color=#ffffff>全体</color>戦場生成[NetherseaBrandUnit]

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Sinking]強度并対其施加4層[Sinking]

levelList.name: 焦灼自我的旁路
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
本技能不会対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則対其施加2層[NervousImpairment]
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加4級[Sinking]強度并対其施加4層[Sinking]与4層[NervousImpairment]

levelList.name: 潮之軌迹
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[AbyssalVitality]層数不低于50層，則消耗5層[AbyssalVitality]并令本技能施加的[NervousImpairment]層数額外+2層
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有10層[NervousImpairment]，消耗1層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 激烈的乱流
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[AbyssalVitality]層数不低于50層，則消耗4層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有10層[NervousImpairment]，消耗3層[AbyssalVitality]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)

levelList.name: 揺曳的波涛
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5層[NervousImpairment]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[EndBattle] 消耗最多10層[AbyssalVitality]并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得層数相当于消耗量一半的[AttackUp](最多5層，向上取整)
- [DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>不会獲得[AttackUp]

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]
